activation_gate: Deferred. Activate after Waves 71-75 have implementation artifacts or approximation packages requiring certification.

external_references.name: Blender command line and background automation
external_references.usage: Blender-first adapter can run scripted scene import, fitting, simulation prep, render-pass export, and validation from command line.

external_references.name: SideFX Houdini hython/hbatch batch workflow
external_references.usage: Optional Houdini adapter can run procedural/SDF/Vellum-style simulation and render/export tasks through command-line tools.

external_references.name: Unreal Python command-line scripting
external_references.usage: Optional Unreal adapter can automate editor/script tasks for physics assets, animation, rendered passes, and real-time simulation evidence.

external_references.name: DAZ Studio scripting
external_references.usage: DAZ is treated as prototype sculpt/source intake and scriptable export surface, not the production physics authority.

external_references.name: DAZ silent FBX export sample
external_references.usage: DAZ prototype packages can be exported without interactive export dialogs when DAZ is available.

external_references.name: DAZ neutral prototype boundary
external_references.usage: DAZ is a neutral A/T-pose prototype and export source only; DAZ dForce, grip posing, hand posing, runtime morphing, production rigging, and production deformation are not allowed after prototype registration.

external_references.name: Marvelous Designer Python API
external_references.usage: Optional clothing adapter can automate garment import, simulation, and export where licensed/available.

external_references.name: Marvelous Designer export API list
external_references.usage: Optional clothing adapter can export OBJ/Alembic and related artifacts for downstream fitting, collision, and map baking.

purpose: Define strict technical, visual, video, audio, safety, and promotion gates for the entire autonomous body-physics/deformation system.

requirements.acceptance_criteria: physics_certification_manifest is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for one certification manifest tying request, prototype, production base, simulation package, ComfyUI outputs, and QA evidence.
requirements.notes: one certification manifest tying request, prototype, production base, simulation package, ComfyUI outputs, and QA evidence
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement physics_certification_manifest

requirements.acceptance_criteria: full_frame_visual_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for whole-image/full-frame review for anatomy, identity, hands, feet, face, clothing, props, background, contact, and artifacts.
requirements.notes: whole-image/full-frame review for anatomy, identity, hands, feet, face, clothing, props, background, contact, and artifacts
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement full_frame_visual_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: full_duration_video_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for full clip plus representative frame-grid review for drift, flicker, temporal popping, motion, contact, and loop/cut boundaries.
requirements.notes: full clip plus representative frame-grid review for drift, flicker, temporal popping, motion, contact, and loop/cut boundaries
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement full_duration_video_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: full_duration_audio_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for audio playback review for clipping, noise, event timing, foley, breath, cloth, support contact, and AV sync.
requirements.notes: audio playback review for clipping, noise, event timing, foley, breath, cloth, support contact, and AV sync
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement full_duration_audio_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: mesh_collision_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for no clipping, no penetration, collision ownership, backstop behavior, and proxy alignment.
requirements.notes: no clipping, no penetration, collision ownership, backstop behavior, and proxy alignment
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement mesh_collision_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: visual_collision_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for generated image/video shows plausible contact, no floating limbs, no impossible overlaps, no contact shadow errors.
requirements.notes: generated image/video shows plausible contact, no floating limbs, no impossible overlaps, no contact shadow errors
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement visual_collision_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: gravity_plausibility_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for body gravity, body-part gravity, contact load, sag, drape, rebound, and settling are plausible for scene orientation.
requirements.notes: body gravity, body-part gravity, contact load, sag, drape, rebound, and settling are plausible for scene orientation
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement gravity_plausibility_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: soft_body_motion_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for jiggle, bounce, shake, ripple, rebound, damping, and decay are plausible and not cartoonish unless requested.
requirements.notes: jiggle, bounce, shake, ripple, rebound, damping, and decay are plausible and not cartoonish unless requested
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement soft_body_motion_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: shape_identity_continuity_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for body shape, face identity, proportions, hands, feet, and clothing ownership do not drift across frames or rerenders.
requirements.notes: body shape, face identity, proportions, hands, feet, and clothing ownership do not drift across frames or rerenders
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement shape_identity_continuity_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: material_surface_detail_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for skin pores, wrinkles, cellulite, folds, dents, fabric stress, and surface detail are localized and not over-sharpened.
requirements.notes: skin pores, wrinkles, cellulite, folds, dents, fabric stress, and surface detail are localized and not over-sharpened
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement material_surface_detail_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: multi_character_physics_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for multi-character contact, occlusion, ownership, separation, and identity protection pass.
requirements.notes: multi-character contact, occlusion, ownership, separation, and identity protection pass
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement multi_character_physics_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: support_surface_physics_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for bed/chair/couch/floor/table/pillow/blanket contact, compression, shadows, and load transfer pass.
requirements.notes: bed/chair/couch/floor/table/pillow/blanket contact, compression, shadows, and load transfer pass
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement support_surface_physics_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: body_region_route_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for body regions or sensitive regions only route with explicit geometry evidence and never accidentally.
requirements.notes: body regions or sensitive regions only route with explicit geometry evidence and never accidentally
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement body_region_route_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: proxy_to_final_match_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for DAZ prototype, production base, simulation proxy, and final ComfyUI output match enough for physics guidance to be valid.
requirements.notes: DAZ prototype, production base, simulation proxy, and final ComfyUI output match enough for physics guidance to be valid
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement proxy_to_final_match_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: map_value_range_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for all maps have expected dimensions, frame counts, alpha/value ranges, and coordinate conventions.
requirements.notes: all maps have expected dimensions, frame counts, alpha/value ranges, and coordinate conventions
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement map_value_range_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: temporal_map_consistency_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for temporal masks, flow, motion vectors, deformation maps, and generated frames stay aligned.
requirements.notes: temporal masks, flow, motion vectors, deformation maps, and generated frames stay aligned
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement temporal_map_consistency_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: audio_visual_event_alignment_qa is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for audio events match visual contact, mouth/breath/chest motion, footsteps, impacts, and cloth movement.
requirements.notes: audio events match visual contact, mouth/breath/chest motion, footsteps, impacts, and cloth movement
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement audio_visual_event_alignment_qa

requirements.acceptance_criteria: regression_suite is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for rerun proof for schemas, adapter outputs, package routes, visual/audio QA, and target-runtime evidence.
requirements.notes: rerun proof for schemas, adapter outputs, package routes, visual/audio QA, and target-runtime evidence
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement regression_suite

requirements.acceptance_criteria: failure_classification_policy is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for classify failures as map, proxy, adapter, ComfyUI route, generation, visual QA, audio QA, or technical blocker.
requirements.notes: classify failures as map, proxy, adapter, ComfyUI route, generation, visual QA, audio QA, or technical blocker
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement failure_classification_policy

requirements.acceptance_criteria: final_promotion_gate is complete only when strict evidence proves full-artifact visual/video/audio and physics-specific QA passed, or a precise blocker is recorded.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously run or require strict evidence for no physics/deformation system row can be marked complete from docs, taxonomies, or one smoke artifact alone.
requirements.notes: no physics/deformation system row can be marked complete from docs, taxonomies, or one smoke artifact alone
requirements.title: Certify QA requirement final_promotion_gate

title: Physics, Deformation, Video, Audio, And Visual QA Certification
